untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'trend-termination patterns' (successive failed thrusts, overextension on higher timeframe) and 'reversal move magnitude exceeds N times average of previous counter-trend moves' — these pattern-recognition and relative-magnitude concepts cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and simple comparison operators. Thresholds marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are also unspecified in source material.
translation_notes: Attempted reasonable proxy using ADX for trend confirmation, RSI for momentum extreme detection, and MACD for momentum character shift. However, the core logic of identifying specific termination patterns and comparing reversal magnitude to historical counter-trend moves requires custom pattern detection beyond the allowed indicator vocabulary. This signal is better suited for implementation as a custom scanner or strategy with dedicated pattern-matching logic.
